feedback: Extract draw() methods from Maze.java, Pacman.java, and Ghost.java into the GamePanel rendering pipeline to eliminate java.awt imports from game logic files. The entity classes should only expose position/state via getters; all Graphics2D drawing should happen in GamePanel.paintComponent().
Remove import java.awt.* from Maze.java, Pacman.java, Ghost.java after moving draw() methods to GamePanel. Ghost needs a getColor() getter. Maze draw logic moves to GamePanel.
Keep entity files focused on game logic (position, movement, state) with zero rendering dependencies.
